name: Globalink Investment Inc. Unit
summary: Globalink Investment Inc. Unit consists of one share of common stock, one warrant, and one right to acquire more common stock. It is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on opportunities to acquire businesses and is headquartered in Great Neck, New York.
